name: French & Francophone Studies
note: A grade of C (2.0) or higher must be earned in all courses counted toward the major. One credit from a course taught in French must be taken in the senior year. FRE-499 Exit Exam and Interview is required during the final term before graduation.

sections.label: Eight Credits of 300-400 Level French
sections.description: Eight credits of courses in 300- to 400-level French. FRE-315 Oral and Written Communication Skills (WE) is required. Up to three credits may be earned by study abroad in France or a francophone country. Up to one credit may be from approved courses taught in English.
